chaos_bolt.name: Chaos Bolt
chaos_bolt.description: Setup/Builder: A bolt of unpredictable energy. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Chaos Pip.

unstable_affliction.name: Unstable Affliction
unstable_affliction.description: Setup: Curse the target with shifting energy. Generates 1 Chaos Pip and applies [Marked].

chaos_cataclysm.name: Chaos Cataclysm
chaos_cataclysm.description: Payoff/AOE: A violent eruption of multiple elements. Consumes 5 Chaos Pips to deal massive AOE damage.

mental_burn.name: Mental Burn
mental_burn.description: Payoff: Incinerate the target's psyche. Consumes 3 Chaos Pips to deal high Magic damage and apply [Blinded].

shimmering_skin.name: Shimmering Skin
shimmering_skin.description: Defense: Your form becomes hazy and indistinct. Increases Evasiveness by 50% for 6 ticks.

unstable_shield.name: Unstable Shield
unstable_shield.description: Defense: A shield that reflects 50% of incoming damage but consumes Concentration on every hit.

chaos_blink.name: Chaos Blink
chaos_blink.description: Mobility: Teleport to a random adjacent room. Grants [Untargetable] for 1 tick.

wild_magic_surge.name: Wild Magic Surge
wild_magic_surge.description: Utility/Signature: Your next 5 non-signature blessings are repeated once for free.

sorcerer_physiology.name: Sorcerer Physiology
sorcerer_physiology.description: Passive: Chaos Born. Your Magic power is increased by 15% and you have a 10% chance to generate double Pips on any setup action.
